endpoints.name: Get trade messages for the current user

parameters.name: __count
parameters.description: The total count of items in the feed.

parameters.name: __next
parameters.description: The link for the next page of items in the feed.

parameters.name: Data
parameters.description: The collection of entities for this feed.

children.name: DateTime
children.description: Date and Time the message was generated.

children.name: DisplayType
children.description: Suggestion to the application about how the message should be displayed.

children.name: Default
children.description: No message render method is set.

children.name: Popup
children.description: Message is to popup suggesting immediate attention

children.name: MessageBody
children.description: Trade message body. This is fully formatted text in the language selected for the logged in client.

children.name: AccountDepreciation
children.description: Message to indicate that an account has depreciated beyond a limit as specified by MIFID II regulations. Only sent for configured client segments.

children.name: MarginCall
children.description: A margin call is a message informing the client about loses affecting his ability fulfill the margin requirements of his positions in the market.

children.name: Mifid
children.description: A change has been made to the clients Mifid classification. Only sent for configured client segments.

children.name: Notification
children.description: Message from broker to end client

children.name: PositionDepreciation
children.description: Message to indicate that a position has depreciated beyond a limit as specified by MIFID II regulations. Only sent for configured client segments.

children.name: PriceAlert
children.description: A price alert has been triggered

children.name: ShareWorkspaceNotification
children.description: Platform Workspace Notification: Share workspace notification

children.name: TradeConfirmation
children.description: A very broad set of notifications related to orders and positions. For example: * An order has been placed * An order has expired * An order has been (partially) filled * An order was cancelled * A position was stopped out (due to insufficient margin) * A position was placed

parameters.name: MaxRows
parameters.description: The maximum number of rows that can be returned (if applicable).

Data.MessageBody: Price alert was triggered on EURUSD

endpoints.name: Create a subscription on trade messages

parameters.name: ContextId
parameters.description: The streaming context id that this request is associated with. This parameter must only contain letters (a-z) and numbers (0-9) as well as - (dash) and _ (underscore). It is case insensitive. Max length is 50 characters.

parameters.name: Format
parameters.description: Optional Media type (RFC 2046) of the serialized data updates that are streamed to the client. Currently only application/json and application/x-protobuf is supported. If an unrecognized format is specified, the subscription end point will return HTTP status code 400 - Bad format.

parameters.name: ReferenceId
parameters.description: Mandatory client specified reference id for the subscription. This parameter must only contain alphanumberic characters as well as - (dash) and _ (underscore). Cannot start with _. It is case insensitive. Max length is 50 characters.

parameters.name: RefreshRate
parameters.description: Optional custom refresh rate, measured in milliseconds, between each data update. Note that it is not possible to get a refresh rate lower than the rate specified in the customer service level agreement (SLA).

parameters.name: ReplaceReferenceId
parameters.description: Reference id of the subscription that should be replaced.

parameters.name: Tag Obsolete
parameters.description: : Optional client specified tag used for grouping subscriptions.

Data.MessageBody: Price alert was triggered on EURUSD

parameters.name: ContextId
parameters.description: Unique streaming context ID part of the streaming session.

parameters.name: Tag
parameters.description: The tag which the subscriptions are grouped under.

parameters.name: ContextId
parameters.description: Unique streaming context ID part of the streaming session.

parameters.name: ReferenceId
parameters.description: Unique reference ID of the subscription to remove.
